Package org.key_project.logic

@NullMarked package org.key_project.logic
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project
     
    org.key_project.logic.op
     
    org.key_project.logic.sort
     
  • Class
    Description
    HasOrigin
    Classes with this interface provides a simple human-readable String where they came from.
    LanguageElement
    This interface is used for AST elements of target languages, e.g., Java, Rust, ...
    LogicElement
    This interface is the AST type for only logic specific structures excluding program ASTs
    LogicServices
     
    Name
    A Name object is created to represent the name of an object which usually implements the interface Named.
    Named
    This interface has to be implemented by all logic signature elements, which are identified by their name.
    ParsableVariable
    This interface represents the variables that can be recognized by one of the parsers.
    Program
    The program in a Modality.
    Sorted
     
    SyntaxElement
    This interface declares the methods common to all logic related (terms, formulas, programs) AST nodes.
    SyntaxElementCursor
    A cursor (or walker) for navigating SyntaxElements in pre-order.
    Term
    This interface is implemented by classes that represent terms or formulas.
    TermCreationException
     
    TerminalSyntaxElement
     
    Visitor<T extends Term>
